narrative: A 7-year experienced Recommendation Systems Engineer at Zoho, a product-first company, ranked 18th for the Senior AI/ML Engineer role. The primary driver was their verified skill depth. Their background aligns with the JD, particularly in Search & Retrieval skills like LoRA and Elasticsearch. However, their location in Indore may pose a challenge. A minor concern is flagged regarding their profile credibility, which may impact their overall fit.
